title: Senior Financial Analyst - CRISIL - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - CRISIL - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
CRISIL is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About CRISIL:
CRISIL is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CRISIL!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
